# Lifecycle command result

Shared JSON output shape for lifecycle commands such as `harness execute start`, `harness archive`, `harness reopen`, `harness land`, and `harness land complete`.

- Schema JSON: [lifecycle.result.schema.json](../../../../schema/commands/lifecycle.result.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.LifecycleResult`

## Root Shape

LifecycleResult is the JSON result shape currently shared by `harness execute start`, `harness archive`, `harness reopen`, `harness land`, and `harness land complete`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `artifacts` | `LifecycleArtifacts` | no | Artifacts points to relevant plan and local-state paths for the command. |
| `command` | `string` | yes | Command is the stable command identifier for the result payload. |
| `errors` | `array<ErrorDetail>` | no | Errors lists hard failures that prevented the command from succeeding. |
| `next_actions` | `array<NextAction> | null` | yes | NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order. |
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes | OK reports whether the command succeeded. |
| `state` | `LifecycleState` | yes | State carries the command-specific lifecycle status fields currently emitted by these lifecycle commands. |
| `summary` | `string` | yes | Summary is the concise human-readable outcome description. |

## Definitions

## ErrorDetail

ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | `string` | yes | Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem. |
| `path` | `string` | yes | Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error. |

## LifecycleArtifacts

LifecycleArtifacts lists the relevant plan and local-state paths for a lifecycle command result.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `current_plan_path` | `string` | no | CurrentPlanPath is the worktree-level current-plan pointer path when the command updated it. |
| `from_plan_path` | `string` | yes | FromPlanPath is the source plan path for transitions that move or archive a plan. |
| `local_state_path` | `string` | no | LocalStatePath is the plan-local state cache path when one exists. |
| `to_plan_path` | `string` | yes | ToPlanPath is the destination plan path for transitions that create or move a plan artifact. |

## LifecycleResult

LifecycleResult is the JSON result shape currently shared by `harness execute start`, `harness archive`, `harness reopen`, `harness land`, and `harness land complete`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `artifacts` | `LifecycleArtifacts` | no | Artifacts points to relevant plan and local-state paths for the command. |
| `command` | `string` | yes | Command is the stable command identifier for the result payload. |
| `errors` | `array<ErrorDetail>` | no | Errors lists hard failures that prevented the command from succeeding. |
| `next_actions` | `array<NextAction> | null` | yes | NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order. |
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes | OK reports whether the command succeeded. |
| `state` | `LifecycleState` | yes | State carries the command-specific lifecycle status fields currently emitted by these lifecycle commands. |
| `summary` | `string` | yes | Summary is the concise human-readable outcome description. |

## LifecycleState

LifecycleState carries the current lifecycle command state shape. These fields remain part of the current public contract even though `status` now centers on `current_node`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `lifecycle` | `string` | yes | Lifecycle is the lifecycle phase value used by lifecycle commands. |
| `plan_status` | `string` | yes | PlanStatus is the tracked plan status value used by lifecycle commands. |
| `revision` | `integer` | yes | Revision is the current plan-local revision number. |

## NextAction

NextAction describes one concrete follow-up action that the caller should consider after reading a command result.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `command` | `string | null` | yes | Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command. |
| `description` | `string` | yes | Description explains the suggested next step in plain language. |
